title: ilex hondurensis
intro: Ilex hondurensis, also known as the Honduran holly, is a small shrub or tree species native to Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ilex hondurensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
